languages.text: "Вы должны уйти, Номос. Мы больше не сможем говорить".

traits.locale_text: "Вы должны уйти, Номос. Мы больше не сможем говорить".

languages.text: "You have to leave us now, Nomos. We will speak no more."
languages.original_text: "Вы должны уйти, Номос. Мы больше не сможем говорить".

traits.locale_text: "You must leave, Nomos. We can speak no longer."
"You must leave, Nomos. We can speak no longer."
"You have to leave us now, Nomos. We will speak no more."
"You have to leave us now, Nomos. We will speak no more."
"You have to leave us now, Nomos. We will speak no more."

languages.text: "Ihr müsst uns jetzt verlassen, Nomos. Wir haben nichts mehr zu besprechen."
languages.original_text: "You have to leave us now, Nomos. We will speak no more."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr müsst uns jetzt verlassen, Nomos. Wir haben nichts mehr zu besprechen."

languages.text: “你现在必须离开我们了，诺莫斯。我们不会再交谈了。”
languages.original_text: "You have to leave us now, Nomos. We will speak no more."

traits.locale_text: “你现在必须离开我们了，诺莫斯。我们不会再交谈了。”

languages.text: « Vous devez nous quitter, Nomos. Nous ne nous parlerons plus. »
languages.original_text: "You have to leave us now, Nomos. We will speak no more."

traits.locale_text: « Vous devez nous quitter, Nomos. Nous ne nous parlerons plus. »

languages.text: «Tienes que dejarnos, Nomos. No hablaremos más».
languages.original_text: "You have to leave us now, Nomos. We will speak no more."

traits.locale_text: «Tienes que dejarnos, Nomos. No hablaremos más».

languages.text: "Şimdi bizden ayrılman gerekiyor Nomos. Artık konuşmayacağız."
languages.original_text: "You have to leave us now, Nomos. We will speak no more."

traits.locale_text: "Şimdi bizden ayrılman gerekiyor Nomos. Artık konuşmayacağız."

languages.text: 「もう、ノモス、あなたは私たちを去る必要がある。私たちはもう話さない。」
languages.original_text: "You have to leave us now, Nomos. We will speak no more."

traits.locale_text: 「もう、ノモス、あなたは私たちを去る必要がある。私たちはもう話さない。」
